top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of Manufacturers and Traders Trust Company
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Gold coin salesmen orchestrated plot to set up rival, court finds
top_signals.summary: Ex-employees of Hattons of London took confidential customer data amid a booming market for bullion

top_signals.title: Air Force One begins commissioning flights, final step before presidential use
top_signals.summary: The service announced the delivery of the Qatari-donated aircraft to Joint Base Andrews on Friday and the kickoff of its commissioning flights.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: In photos: Star-studded crowd gathers to celebrate the Obama Presidential Center dedication
top_signals.summary: Barack Obama opened his presidential center in Chicago with former presidents, celebrities and dignitaries in attendance. President Donald Trump was absent.

top_signals.title: Charles Schwab to enter prediction markets with S&P 500 wagers: WSJ
top_signals.summary: The offering from the financial services company will reportedly only include yes-or-no bets on whether the S&P 500 closes above or below a target price.
